Date: Fri Aug 30 08:18:32 2013

URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325665

Log:
  Mark BROKEN-- requires newer version of Qt than in the ports tree
  
  PR:		ports/180292

Modified:
  head/net-p2p/transmission-qt4/Makefile

Modified: head/net-p2p/transmission-qt4/Makefile
==============================================================================

+++ head/net-p2p/transmission-qt4/Makefile	Fri Aug 30 08:18:32 2013	(r325665)
@@ -9,6 +9,8 @@ COMMENT=	Fast and lightweight QT4 BitTor
 LIB_DEPENDS=	${GEN_LIB_DEPENDS}
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${GEN_RUN_DEPENDS}
 
+BROKEN=		Requires newer version of Qt than in the ports tree
+
 DESCR=		${.CURDIR}/pkg-descr
 MASTERDIR=	${.CURDIR}/../transmission-cli
 PLIST=		${.CURDIR}/pkg-plist
